pages.title: Rules Not Loading
pages.text: Check these common issues:$(br2)$(li)File path must be $(o)data/<namespace>/mob_levels/<type>/<name>.json$()$(li)JSON syntax errors (missing commas, braces)$(li)Invalid field names or values$(br2)Enable $(o)debugMode$() in config to see load errors in logs.

pages.title: Rules Not Applying
pages.text: If rules load but don't work:$(br2)$(li)Check priority-higher value wins$(li)Verify structure/biome IDs are correct$(li)Ensure rule is $(o)enabled: true$()$(li)Check mob is not blacklisted$(br2)Use debug mode to see which rule wins for each spawn.

pages.title: Performance Issues
pages.text: If you experience lag:$(br2)$(li)Structure checks are expensive during world gen$(li)Too many boss rules with complex conditions$(li)Excessive attribute modifiers$(br2)The mod already delays structure checks during world generation. Avoid hundreds of complex rules.

pages.title: Common Mistakes
pages.text: Frequent JSON errors:$(br2)$(li)Trailing commas in objects/arrays$(li)Using single quotes instead of double$(li)Wrong data types (string vs number)$(li)Missing required fields$(br2)Validate JSON with online tools before testing.
